# Age & Time Calculator

> Free online age, date, and time calculators. Find your exact age in years, months, weeks, days, hours, minutes, and seconds; calculate the difference between any two dates; add or subtract days, hours, minutes, and seconds; count working days; and more.

Key features: exact age calculation (calendar-accurate, handles leap years and month-end dates), date difference calculator, time addition/subtraction calculator, working-days counter, birthday countdown, live age ticker, plus fun calculators (planet age, zodiac signs, pet age, birthstones). No sign-up required, unlimited use, runs entirely in the browser — dates are never sent to a server.

## Core tools
- [Age Calculator](/): exact age in years, months, weeks, days, hours, minutes, and seconds
- [Date Calculator](/date-difference): difference between two dates and times
- [Time Calculator](/time-calculator): add or subtract days, hours, minutes, and seconds
